== Notes for [[Item:Q107693|Q107693]] ==

Progenitor of ''Fatimid Imamate'' ('''Caliphate''') of '''Egypt'''.

'''9th Shia Ismai'li Imaam'''

* Date of Ascension: 212 AH (827/ 828 AD)
* Period of Imamate: 13 Years
* Author of the 51 Epistles (''Rasaail'') collected under ''Ikhwaan us-Safa'' (Brethren of Purity)
* Wilaadat (Birth): 198 AH (813/ 814 AD)
* Wafaat (Death): 225 AH (839/ 840 AD)

Source: http://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Taqi_Muhammad

-- MERGED NOTE ------------

Wikidata: https://www.wikidata.org/wiki/Q4119345 | Geni: https://www.geni.com/people/6000000015542919021

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
geni:6000000015542919021

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
